action_plan.safe_to_delete: Branches classified SAFE_TO_DELETE_BRANCH after USBAY-AUDIT/USBAY-GLOBAL23 confirm no open PR, evidence dependency, or release dependency remains.
action_plan.needs_runtime_extraction: Branches classified NEEDS_RUNTIME_EXTRACTION must not be merged directly; extract minimal runtime delta first.
action_plan.blocked_not_merge_ready: usbay/live-euria-runtime-integration remains blocked for direct merge because runtime is already in main and remaining delta is PB evidence/recovery work.
action_plan.documentation_only: Documentation-only branches may be reviewed separately with metadata/evidence validation.
action_plan.fail_closed: No branch deletion, merge, or push is authorized by PB-147.
